heading.description: Short event or step label for the icon timeline item.

description.description: One specific explanatory sentence tied to the slide objective.
description.example: The signal marks the moment learners should connect evidence with the concept.

icon_name.description: Required Remix Icon class because the current timelineIcon BlockSpec requires icons.

items.heading: Key Signal
items.description: The signal marks the moment learners should connect evidence with the concept.

items.heading: Clear Action
items.description: The action shows how students can apply the idea in context.

validation_rules: Block type must be exactly smart_layout.
Items must use the current v2 smart-layout item shape: heading, description, and icon_name.
Each primary item description must be 12-15 words.
Every item must include icon_name with a valid Remix Icon class.
The generated block must contain exactly the item count requested by the v2 prompt.
Current timelineIcon BlockSpec profiles support 4 items for vertical_icon_short or 5-6 items for vertical_icon_long.
Do not add fields that the v2 prompt does not request.
